title: Organised Money Is Who I Am Now
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing the old identity of financial chaos and claiming the organised version as current
excerpt: A two-minute energy statement from Day 55 of a 12-week money program. The release names the residual identity of being disorganised with money; the allow claims organised finances as the current reality, not an aspiration.
sourceNotes: The release-and-allow structure is drawn from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024). Adapted for Day 55 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796).

practice.whenToUse: Use when the old story of being disorganised with money is pulling at your sense of how things are now, or when you want to reinforce that the organised version is your current identity.

content.text: A two-minute energy statement for consolidating a shift in identity around money organisation. The release names the old story — the chaos, the shame, the sense of not being someone who manages money well. The allow claims the current reality as already true.

I am ready to release all residual identity as someone who is disorganised with money, all shame about past chaos, all sense that order is something I still have to earn. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.

I am ready to align with and allow that organised money is who I am now. That I know where everything is, that I open statements without dread, that this is how I operate. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
The release-and-allow structure comes from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024). Adapted for Day 55 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
